programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Amateurs compete to make absinthe.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: George Washington Rye
programme.desc: Three distillers compete to make a recipe created by George Washington himself. Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only one competitor can earn the prestigious title of Master Distiller for producing the first president's own signature liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mason Jar Shortage
programme.desc: A Mason jar shortage puts a lid on Mark and Digger's distribution plans. Mike and Jerry must return to land they've been warned off. Tim's scheme to repurpose a massive tank as an oversized pot still pushes his steam boiler to the breaking point.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Ice Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger invent a new recipe turning hundreds of jars of expired mandarin oranges into marketable liquor. Tickle and the Laws face headaches in their attempt to produce freeze-distilled apple liquor. Mike and Jerry make birch bark moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Another Man's Mash
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe with master distiller Richard Landry. Mark and Digger crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Basement Bust
programme.desc: Josh gains access to a cellar still site, but even help from the Laws can't keep trouble from surfacing. Mark and Digger innovate a way to cut the cost of water cooling, and bayou shiner Richard makes a medicinal moonshine from wild-grown manglier.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: They're Crawling!
programme.desc: Kay denies that she is a hoarder, but a home filled with clutter and deadly vermin tells another story.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Polygamist and Proud!

programme.desc: The Merrifields head to Mexico to reunite with fiancee Roberta. The plot thickens as the Snowdens reveal a new twist in their world. Rather than search online, the Joneses go out on the town. Life in the Winder home is looking very different these days.

programme.desc: An angry taxi driver gives Ponytail a piece of his mind; a woman looks for her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: An angry man can't retrieve the rental car that was towed when he took his wife to the hospital.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Shawn must deal with parking violators as he tries to keep the streets safe for kids.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: In Detroit, a day releasing boots turns wild for Rodney when a man tries to drive off in the middle of a tow.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Charles is called every name in the book except his real one as he tries to keep the bus lane clear.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Evelyn faces an angry violator as she patrols the Italian neighbourhood in Providence.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Mo' Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Top Meat and Greet
programme.desc: In Riverside, Kenny gets baited into bidding on a massive locker; Rene and Casey try to go small and end up churning out a few bucks, while Shana and Edwina's mystery box is mislabeled.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Crate Balls of Fire
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, the buyers bid on 10 vaults belonging to the same owner. Dave snaps up almost half of them, while Ivy draws a nice profit out of his. But in the end, Mary and Kenny end up doing all the heavy lifting.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fa-La-La-Lala, La-La-La-Locker!
programme.desc: Once again in Riverside, Shana and Edwina bring their 'Golden Girls Chic' but end up phoning it in. Dave trains his eyes on a messy unit. Rene isn't supposed to be buying, so he sells instead.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Goat Tell It on the Mountain
programme.desc: Justin almost hits the bullseye on his locker, while Darrell and Chad's fortunes are found on the farm.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Ivy: The Pro-fession-ale
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod go all in on a hunch. Kenny tries to downsize his strategy. Ivy shows a skeptical Emily how he pulls a win out of a locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mary's RE-finds
programme.desc: It's nine stories of treasures in Koreatown and the Vegas Ladies discover that one of them has Texas flair. Kenny lucks out looking for lady stuff. And Mary gets the spring back in her step.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Crickets and Wickets
programme.desc: In West Covina, Rene brings Gunther along for moral support but gets annoyed when he won't take sides. Darrell stumbles over what may be a diamond in the rough. Brandi and Jarrod discover a different national pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Quality Bro Chime
programme.desc: It's 'Bring your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks. Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point. Kenny finds the time to make a nice profit, piece by piece.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Indiana Ivy and the Temple of Phlegm
programme.desc: This time, Darrell might be at risk of losing the title of 'The King of Montebello.' Brandi and Jarrod find their way back to the auction with the help of some pocket tech. Casey bails himself out despite being confined with an infectious German.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tour de Van Nuys
programme.desc: The parking lot is tiny in Van Nuys, and Mary needs a little help managing it. Dave picks up a locker that turns out to be therapeutic, while Justin tries to show the rest of them how to make the most out of a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bo-ZAK That Whip
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the City of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting. Ivy finds his fun in the little things. Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories.

programme.title: Storage Wars: We Don't Use the 'S' Word Around Here
programme.desc: Rolling into Buena Park with their crew, Brandi and Jarrod pick up what may be the best of the worst. Kenny and his cousin glide through a locker that's only half decent. Ivy comes to the auction dressed to kill. Mary tries to turn up the volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Talking in Cody
programme.desc: In Moreno Valley, Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary’s fraternization with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: Movie: The Break Up
programme.desc: A woman, who feels neglected and unappreciated by her boyfriend, breaks out of their relationship in an effort to make him miss her. When he misunderstands her intent, war ensues, with both of them refusing to move out of their newly purchased condo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.desc: Phil takes Haley on a college tour of his old alma mater, and Claire forces Mitchell and Cameron to take her for a fun night out with the boys. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay deal with a situation at home that may require having 'the talk' with Manny.

programme.desc: Gloria is jealous of another couple's activity level and demands that Jay step it up for a night of salsa dancing. Cameron takes a bet too far when Mitchell and Crispin challenge him to get a woman's number at the bar.

programme.desc: Phil begins to wonder what could have been when a neighbourhood kid returns to town as an Internet billionaire. Thanksgiving finds the family divided, but a punkin' chunkin' challenge settles the score.

programme.desc: While gathered at Jay and Gloria's pool on a sunny December day, the family realizes that everyone will be scattered during the holidays, and that if they want to celebrate Christmas together, it will have to be today.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: Egg Drop
programme.desc: Luke and Manny are given a school project to design a capsule that will protect an egg from a two-story drop, but when Claire and Jay catch wind of it, their own competitive drives kick in.

programme.title: Modern Family: Little Bo Bleep
programme.desc: The family helps Claire prepare for her upcoming televised debate with Duane Bailey for the town council seat. Lily discovers her first expletive just in time to act as a flower girl. Jay is very concerned with Stella's recent strange behaviour.

programme.title: Botched: Boner-free Zone
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman's 'boner-free zone.' Dr. Nassif fixes the nose of a woman who had her dentist perform her rhinoplasty, and the doctors meet a mother who had extensive plastic surgery to look exactly like her daughter.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Greedy
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr. Dubrow works on a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs and the doctors are left speechless by a patient who can only be described as 'unique.'

programme.title: Botched: The Wizard of Schnoz
programme.desc: Terry makes a breast cancer survivor feel whole again while Paul operates on two sisters' twin beaks, affirming that he is the true Wizard of Schnoz. Terry gets a visit from his favorite patient...his wife, Heather.

programme.title: Botched: Where the Wildd Things Are
programme.desc: The doctors help the self-proclaimed 'most unlucky person in the world.' Lacey Wildd is back with a problem bigger than her boobs. A transgender showgirl seeks the Doctors help to become her favorite cartoon character.

programme.title: Botched: The Living Doll
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow operates on a transgender woman's uni-boob, Dr. Nassif fixes a 24-year-old crater on a woman's nose and the Doctors meet Blondie who aspires to be a plastic doll.

programme.title: Botched: Stitched Up Sisters
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow keeps it all in the family when he performs full body work on a pair of co-dependent sisters. Dr. Nassif operates on a large man with an even larger nose and the doctors meet Youtuber and extreme waist trainer Penny Brown.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Old School
programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Not So Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: The shop agrees to build a brave father a hot rod wheelchair, and Danny gets stuck in a bind when a pink car project doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: GT Oh My My
programme.desc: Danny turns a 1967 GTO into a world class muscle car and hopes for a monstrous flip. Later, Mike and Roli get in a sticky situation and Danny tries to buy a classic Mercury from an old friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Power and Glory
programme.desc: When Mark asks Danny to build a bike in memory of eight sailors who were lost while serving with him on the USS Belknap, Danny knows he must create something special in their honour. Later, Danny finds a beautiful, rare Corvette in a driveway.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Don't Tell Danny
programme.desc: Mike buys a Smart car and wants to trick it out at the shop, but Kevin warns that Danny hates new cars and can't find out about it until it's done. Danny and Kevin go for a spin in Kevin's new Caddy and come across a 1939 Ford.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: A Legend on Two Wheels
programme.desc: When Danny is asked to create a commemorative bike that honours music legend Les Paul, he has to pull out all the stops and hopes his team can get it done in 30 days. Horny Mike wants to impress Danny and looks at a 1940 Dodge that's for sale.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part One
programme.desc: A client asks Danny to find and build a 1979 Camaro Z28 to commemorate the first car he ever owned. After finding one online, the project turns into a nightmare when the car is in worse condition than they thought.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part Two
programme.desc: Danny's battle with nightmare Z28 continues as he puts it through endless fabrication to bring it back to life. When the client comes to pick it up, Danny will finally learn if it was worth all the trouble.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Baggers Can't Be Choosers
programme.desc: A customer wants to trick out his 2004 Harley-Davidson Road Glide, but both Shannon and Ryan aren't sure they can do everything he wants. A fellow collector drops by dangling a rare 1970 Lincoln Mark III in front of Danny, who can't wait to take her out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: True Fire Fiasco
programme.desc: A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer. Also, Danny stumbles upon a collection of seriously fast rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tommy Lee's Chopper
programme.desc: When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it: the guys who built it, Count's Kustoms. Danny and Ryan take in a cool collection to cheer them up after seeing Tommy's smashed bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dee's Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings Danny and the gang a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns to disaster when she is not happy with the finished product, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Burt Reynolds' Rides
programme.desc: Vegas Golden Knights goalie Marc-André Fleury comes to Count's Kustoms looking for an all-American muscle car fit for a three-time Stanley Cup champion. Plus, Danny agrees to prep several of Burt Reynold's personal rides for auction.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Little Red Corvette
programme.desc: Danny finds a 1966 Corvette Stingray, but has to convince its owner to let it go. Meanwhile, the Count's Kustom's Crew takes Danny's latest SEMA creation to a car auction.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mike Gets Medieval
programme.desc: Danny tasks Mike with painting a Medieval mural on a '73 GMC Pick Up truck, a decision he soon regrets. He also stumbles across a rare Carroll Shelby designed sportster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Brutal Worlds of the Forgotten
programme.desc: An abandoned island complex and a haunted prison fortress contain a dark and terrifying past of bloodshed; experts investigate the violent secrets behind these ghostly structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Discovery on the Edge
programme.desc: Bringing scholars and skeptics together to solve the mystery of the Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard gain access to runestone samples for the forensic geologist to conduct testing, and they meet with an archaeo-physics team that finds metal artifacts buried at the site where the runestone was discovered.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery on Runestone Hill
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard begin a brand-new excavation at the mysterious Runestone Hill; what they find could change the course of their investigation.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate new leads, and when they meet a Native American professor who provides new information, they realize they must expand their investigation to the East Coast.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Expedition Viking
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard travel to the East Coast to see stone engravings that could provide further answers and evidence. They also meet with a historian who takes them on a boat trip to follow in the footsteps of the Vikings.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relics of Intrigue
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate a set of runestone relics that could reveal new truths about the mysterious Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate a theory that the Knights Templar were in America; new discoveries lead them deeper into a web of secret symbols and intrigue.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Journey to Enigma Island
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard venture to a set of islands that could have been the site of Viking landings in America, and using cutting-edge archaeological technology, they look for evidence of long-lost Viking ships.

programme.title: Unearthed: Legend of King Midas

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2018, in the mountains of Colorado a young pilot goes missing without a trace, leaving behind her baby. Police follow the few clues they have and unravel a story far more bizarre and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer

programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: River Monster
programme.desc: When the torso of single mother Mary Stetson washes up along Manchester, NH's Piscataquog River, police retrace her final steps. But every place along Mary's path presents new mysteries, and people who aren't as innocent as they first appear.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Murder on the Hudson
programme.desc: In Albany, NY, a young woman storms out of the house to track down her wayward boyfriend. And disappears into the night. But when her body is found washed up on the mucky banks of the Hudson River, detectives realize they have a killer on the loose.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Investigators find lies and false confessions across two states when a teenager is found dead in Kentucky.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood on the Tracks
programme.desc: After a body is discovered in Silver Lakes, CA, detectives work to piece a difficult puzzle together. They uncover a web of lies that unveils a sordid tale of betrayal. At trial the truth finally emerges and the identity of the killer is revealed.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Evil Lurks
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare comes to life when her son goes missing. The search comes up empty until a motorist makes a horrific discovery. But nothing can prepare this small town for the terrible secret revealed. Evil has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Killer Coverup
programme.desc: A beloved friend and co-worker goes missing on a desolate mountain, and detectives must sort through a list of tightknit colleagues with potential motives for murder. One of them has crucial information that will lead to a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Leaving behind Scranton, Pennsylvania, a woman and her family head for the white sands of Florida to start a new life. When one of them disappears, their dream becomes a nightmare they must live over, and over again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: An ex-wife guns down her unarmed ex-husband in a parking lot and maintains she shot in self-defense after being abused.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: After Kacie Woody discovers Internet chat rooms, the popular teen has her pick of high school hunks hoping to connect. The teen is exchanging IMs with her latest love interest, when a silver van creaks to a stop outside her house.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Clash of the Tartans
programme.desc: Southern Oregon is a campers' paradise...but for one local businessman's family a weekend in the woods will become a nightmare. Open marriages and forbidden relationships will lead to someone's watery grave.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: Identifcal twins Tim and Todd Nicholson lived fast and furiously until one was murdered at the hands of his own brother.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Married to the Devil
programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Secrets
programme.desc: From the Great Phenol Plot of WWI to the D-Day deception Operation Fortitude, and from the world's first large-scale cyberattack to the greatest counterfeiting scheme in history, learn about the greatest secrets of warfare of the last century.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puff the Magic Mallow
programme.desc: Alton Brown shares the sweet, sticky science behind homemade marshmallows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Popover Sometime
programme.desc: Armed with one recipe Alton creates a variety of dishes from a breakfast treat to a dinner classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tamale Never Dies
programme.desc: Alton embarks on a historical and tasty exploration of tamales, which are quite possibly the original convenience food.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics IV: Spaghetti
programme.desc: Alton explores spaghetti with meat sauce as an American classic and its origins.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Houston, TX, one of the most dynamic and underrated food scenes in the United States. He digs into some classic Tex-Mex fare, loads up on the best brisket in town and gets a taste of the city's crave-worthy international cuisines.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Oakland
programme.desc: Andrew discovers the true soul of Oakland, CA, as he explores its diversity and sense of community. He visits a cozy breakfast joint, samples some of the city's freshest fare at Swan's Market.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cork
programme.desc: Andrew explores the charismatic city of Cork, Ireland, where fertile land and an expansive coastline make it a food lovers' haven. Locals line up for traditional favorites and artisanal delicacies like Irish stew and drisheen.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Curacao
programme.desc: Andrew enjoys bold, tropical flavors on the Caribbean island of Curacao.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Melting Pot
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a made-in-the-USA, multicultural menu. A family-run Philadelphia factory for the secrets of an authentic Italian cannoli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Biting Words
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean uncovers the wondrous ways behind some famous food clichés.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gone Camping
programme.desc: Gear up and stake your tents as host Michael McKean sets up camp just in time for supper.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Brunch Beauties
programme.desc: Michael McKean skips breakfast and forgets about lunch so he can get to the bottom of brunch. He discovers how eggs Benedict was blessed by a pope and that we may have a melty mishap to thank for the croque monsieur.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Good Eats: Behind the Eats
programme.desc: The show's crew reveals their thrilling, compelling and sometimes hard to believe behind the scenes secrets.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: The cocktail is a truly American art form that few Americans know much about. Alton sets up the basics of a bar, contemplates ice as an ingredient and properly prepares three classics that open the door to the world of cocktail mixology.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin is one of the most luxurious cuts of critter known to man, expensive too. Alton investigates where this costly cut comes from, how to buy it and what to do to get your money's worth out of it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin 2
programme.desc: Alton completes his strategy of getting your money's worth from the luxurious cut of meat known as beef tenderloin. We learn the legends and preparations of Carpaccio, Philly Cheese steak and the perfect Chateaubriand.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Street Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.desc: Emotions run high at the villas as the reality of life after the island starts to set in.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pursuit

programme.desc: While Barbra Jean is away in St. Louis, Reba has to take care of an ailing Brock. Elsewhere, Cheyenne volunteers at a homeless shelter, but is disappointed when she is assigned the unglamorous task of doing dishes in the kitchen.

programme.title: Reba: Parenting With Puppets
programme.desc: After Jake lies about breaking Reba's lamp, Reba is forced to retract her criticism of Barbra Jean's parenting skills. Meanwhile, Brock and Van are mistaken for a gay couple when they spend their 'guy time' at a day spa.

programme.title: Reba: Don't Mess With Taxes
programme.desc: When the IRS audits Reba, she discovers that Brock has a few secrets he doesn't want the IRS to find out about. Meanwhile, Van receives a lot of attention from Cheyenne's classmates when he takes part in a sociology project about marriage.

programme.title: Reba: The Goodbye Guy
programme.desc: In the wake of Barbra Jean telling the IRS that Reba and Brock owe $75,000 in back taxes, Brock decides to pay off the debt by selling his house and moving to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Reba: The Trouble With Dr. Hunky
programme.desc: Reba goes on a date with Dr. Jack Morgan, who has returned to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba. Later, a startling admission by Jack has Reba seeking advice from Brock.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Joanna Garcia Swisher and Allen Leech from Hallmark Channel's original movie 'As Luck Would Have It.' Co-host of The Kitchen, Katie Lee.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Reba: Money Blues
programme.desc: When Reba learns that Cheyenne must document all of her purchases, Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne more as an equal, but Van decides to give Cheyenne an allowance instead. Meanwhile, Jake starts a lucrative business selling soda to his classmates.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Landlord
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them. Not liking this arrangement, Barbra Jean decides to sue Reba after she sprains her ankle in the house.

programme.title: Reba: The Blonde Leading the Blind
programme.desc: When Reba undergoes laser eye surgery she is left temporarily blind and Barbra Jean insists on helping her until she gets her eyesight back.

programme.title: Reba: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: When Reba, Brock, Cheyenne and Van attend a therapy session, Reba fears things have gone from bad to worse. Later, Barbra Jean crashes the session and they end up telling the therapist about the crazy things they have done to each other over the years.

programme.title: Movie: Chasing Waterfalls
programme.desc: A photographer takes a trip to find a remote waterfall, along the way, she finds a handsome guide.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Winter

programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: The Search

programme.title: The Office: Threat Level Midnight

programme.title: The Office: Todd Packer

programme.title: The Office: Garage Sale

programme.title: The Office: Training Day

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Last Dundies
programme.desc: Michael trains Deangeloe on how to take over the job of hosting the Dundie Awards.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Michael
programme.desc: Michael is leaving for Colorado but wants one day without drama in order to say goodbye to his co-workers. Deangelo and Andy scramble to keep Michael's biggest clients.

programme.desc: Michael is leaving for Colorado but wants one day without drama in order to say goodbye to his co-workers. Deangelo and Andy scramble to keep Michael's biggest clients.

programme.title: The Office: The Inner Circle

programme.title: South Park: Lice Capades
programme.desc: When Mrs. Garrison refuses to name names about an infestation of head lice that plagues South Park Elementary, Cartman finds a way to detect who has lice.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: 1%

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay!
programme.desc: The boys are hot to be gay once the metrosexual craze hits South Park. Meanwhile, Mr. Garrison accuses the Queer Eye guys of selling out.

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: Futurama: Meanwhile

programme.title: Futurama: Space Pilot 3000
programme.desc: A pizza delivery boy falls into a cryogenic stasis tube the on the exact moment that 1999 comes to an end. When he awakens, he finds the date is December 31st, 2999. With the help of new friends, he must adapt to life in the 31st century.

programme.title: Futurama: The Series Has Landed

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: After singing and dancing representatives from an anti-smoking campaign rap about the dangers of smoking, the kids at South Park Elementary believe it to be cooler than the campaign, and take up the habit.

programme.title: South Park: Cripple Fight
programme.desc: Big Gay Al returns to South Park as the new scout leader. When he is fired for being gay, the boys rally to his defence with the help of the new 'handi-capable' kid, Jimmy.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: After a student is gunned down in broad daylight, the investigation reveals she had more than a few secrets. Meanwhile, Jane's mother Angela gets into a spat with her father over the car.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I'm Your Boogie Man
programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Beast in Me
programme.desc: When an identity thief with no apparent identity of his own is found murdered in his car, the investigation leads Jane into Boston's checkered past. A startling discovery about the victim sends Maura on a personal quest.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tennessee Whiskey
programme.desc: Mark and Digger discover a limestone source to make Tennessee Whiskey right under their feet. Just when Tim thought he was out, the Laws pulls him back in to cross state lines in search of a key ingredient. Richard turns cotton candy into moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Tons of Fun
programme.desc: Josh drives a tractor trailer full of stills across state lines to help Tickle and the Laws run two tons of malted corn. Mark and Digger christen their own secret Tennessee Whiskey distillery. Richard builds a copper Virginia-style submarine still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Moonshine Capital Returns
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Josh, Tickle and the Laws build an expansive still farm for the history books in Virginia while Jerry misses a day and Mike lets his guard down. Later, Mark and Digger's rival faces a reckoning with the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Backwoods Bonanza
programme.desc: In the season finale, with eight stills running full tilt, Tickle enlists Mrs. Tickle to stash too much shine. Mark and Digger devise a way to age their Tennessee whiskey at sea. Tim gets drawn into an epic bootleg, while Mike and Jerry face the law.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue: For Pete's Sake
programme.desc: Peter Freedman's sunk everything he has into building a mine with every gadget imaginable, but he's still not catching gold. Freddy and Juan make quick progress with their rescue but hit a wall until they discover a simple, fortune-changing fix.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The Fifty Ounce Test
programme.desc: With Dave home for his father's memorial, Team Turin makes a promise to hit it big in his honor. But with the Bank Cut running out, Jason must think outside the box to find new ground and keep them on the gold.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue: Young Guns
programme.desc: In Oregon, 23-year-old Jagger and his younger brothers' dream of running their own gold mine is in jeopardy until a visit from Freddy and Juan skyrockets their gold haul.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The Fifty Ounce Test
programme.desc: With Dave home for his father's memorial, Team Turin makes a promise to hit it big in his honor. But with the Bank Cut running out, Jason must think outside the box to find new ground and keep them on the gold.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: NASA's Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the whereabouts of a lost relic of the Space Age that tarnished the reputation of NASA's first astronauts; as cutting-edge technology turns up brand-new evidence, experts might finally vindicate this American hero.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle Doomsday
programme.desc: Mysterious reports of boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle might be evidence of a deadly undersea volcano with a long list of victims. Jeremy Wade investigates the newest discoveries from this strange stretch of water in search of proof.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: US Navy vs. UFO
programme.desc: Newly declassified files reveal the details of an unexplained encounter between the US Navy and UFOs that seem to defy the laws of physics. Using cutting-edge tech, Jeremy Wade investigates the truth behind this alien mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes inside a cutting-edge archaeological investigation that is unearthing brand-new discoveries about Noah's Ark. As experts get closer to finding its final resting place, they reveal the long-lost secrets of this famous vessel.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Fortune of the Buzzard
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases the lost treasure of Olivier Levasseur, AKA 'The Buzzard,' rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Let's Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Aimee's mom, Rachel, comes to visit, stirring up Erica's insecurities and causing a confrontation with Paige and Dave. As if family drama isn't enough, Erica and Spencer need to have 'the sex talk' with the older kids.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Step Kid Swap
programme.desc: Erica and Spencer have a step-kid swap so each parent can build a better bond with their step-children. Then, the time has come for four of Erica's seven kids to get their annual MRI screening for cancer cells, and Quinn has a bone to pick with Spencer.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Girl Fights and Big Heights
programme.desc: With the Quints fighting more than ever, the Busbys agree to join the Mills in San Antonio to shake things up. Meanwhile, Hazel is prescribed an unexpected treatment at her eye appointment, and Danielle faces her fear of heights.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Nacho-Typical Thanksgiving

programme.title: Storage Wars: Om Sweet Om
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in "Bourgie Brea," and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head-to-head on a giant pair of sister lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Grandma's Havoc
programme.desc: In Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr. run the operation. Kenny feels run down and his lack of focus lands him a locker, though there's a pleasant surprise in the end. Mary, Shana and Edwina just can’t seem to make anything stick.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Cloudy With a Chance of Profit
programme.desc: It's a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Let's Give 'Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Dave travels to Murietta and is hoping his competition won't want to purchase a large locker they have to move. Justin snags a decent locker. Ivy and Ivy Jr. have a therapeutic day. Mary locates a little treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Drama in the LBC
programme.desc: Darrell and Dave wager on who got the better sister; locker, that is. Brandi and Jarrod spend way too much, but see their treasure soar.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Weekend at Barry's
programme.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fowl Play
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Torrance and Dave sees an increase in his profits. It's positive news when Mary discovers some clothes that don't fit. Kenny tries a be an early bird, but winds up becoming the dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?
programme.desc: Mary and Ivy wager that each can better predict final locker prices than the other. Dave's locker closely resembles a chop shop, while Rene and Tatianna catch a stash of vintage sporting goods.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Sale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Ivy and Ivy Jr. clean up with their locker. Following on to Whittier, Kenny gets some advice from a music legend.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Wind Beneath My Bids
programme.desc: 30+mph winds batter Desert Hot Springs, and the buyers do their best to keep standing. Rene and Gunther dust off an old locker. Brandi and Jarrod's unit takes a turn and ends up lapping the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Not all that Glitters is Gourd
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies arrive in vintage style, though not everyone agrees. Darrell tries to peddle his wares to Emily.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mistress of the Snark
programme.desc: Ivy thinks he's a comedian in Stanton but the gizmo in his locker is no joke.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Way of the YUUUP!
programme.desc: Back in Torrance, Mary dabbles with Dave's dark arts, while Kenny takes some excavation lessons. Brandi and Jarrod quit horsing around long enough to stumble across a wartime oddity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Clothes Quarters

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Catch Me If You Cannes

programme.title: Chopped: Latin Cuisine Dream

programme.title: Chopped: Wonton Wonder

programme.title: Chopped: College Competition

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Brunch Anniversary
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a special brunch for the family to celebrate her and her husband Nick's third wedding anniversary. There's shakshuka with feta, Brussel sprout and bacon hash, roasted potatoes with paprika mayo and pocket pastries for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Entertaining the Girls
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's girlfriends are coming over for dinner so she's preparing her go-to special menu. There's going to be make-ahead sticky rhubarb short ribs, a show-stopping crispy saffron rice dish and a fresh side of green beans with potato chip crunch.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm-Style Bowling
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are bringing some bowling party fun to the farm. Nick's building their own lane, and they're inviting friends over to play and enjoy.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Passover
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating day two of Passover on the farm with her super crispy giant skillet latke for lunch. For dinner, succulent spatchcock roast chicken is served with mouthwatering schmaltzy potatoes and green goddess sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Low Carb Lusciousness
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is working on some great new ideas for cooking low carb.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner's All Done
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's driving to town, but dinner's all ready to go when she gets home! There's a great Shepherd's Pie made from a hearty Beef Stew with Beer and Paprika, covered in a thick layer of Horseradish Mashed Potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Birthday To Me
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond's birthday, and she's celebrating by making over some of her all-time favorite recipes and road-testing them for social media. She starts with mini turkey meatloaves, a thoroughly modern take on a comfort food classic.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Good Morning Drummond Ranch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond welcomes the morning at the Drummond ranch and makes a pairing of savory breakfast kabobs and sweet breakfast kabobs with shortcut doughnut holes and honey yogurt dipping sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Crazy 8's
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and the kids serve up some awesome eats with just 8 ingredients. There's a colorful clementine sprinkle cake, a creamy and crunchy easy chicken tot pie, cheesy stuffed pasta and a shortcut speedy dumpling soup.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner Cook-Off
programme.desc: Chefs are cooking every meal on the menu: breakfast, lunch and dinner. First, they must make a sweet and savoury breakfast from items found in the store's clearance carts. Then, a family lunch is complicated by a red light special.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Fried Feud

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All in the Family

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
