programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: House Hunters: Trading Silicon Valley for San Diego
programme.desc: A couple from Silicon Valley looks for a home near family in San Diego. He's looking for something that has wow factor with a resort style backyard, but she is determined to make sure his dreams don't bust their budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: Highs and Lows in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple in Columbus, OH, is at odds over the head space in a potential new home. One wants a Cape Cod with a home office and doesn't mind sloping roofs, but finding a vintage home where the other doesn't have to duck in each room is a tall order.

programme.title: Everything But the House: An Auction With a Cause
programme.desc: A couple needs help raising money for their food pantry, and they hope to sell everything in his grandfather's former waterfront home. They plan to use their auction profits to help those in need, so Lara and her team work to bring in the big bucks.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Memories and Memorabilia
programme.desc: A couple wants to clear out her childhood home that is packed with her parents' collectibles. Lara and her team dig in to find some rare treasures, including scarce political buttons and a vintage candy dispenser worth a surprising amount of money.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Retirement Riches
programme.desc: A woman wants to retire in Aruba, so she, her son and his girlfriend join forces with Lara Spencer and her team of appraisers to find valuable collectibles to auction off and turn into cash for the move. Plus, her son plans a very special surprise find.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Farmhouse Finds
programme.desc: Lara Spencer and her team head to a New York farm to help a couple sell his parents' prized collectables. They hope to use the money they raise to fix up the farm, start a new business selling jams and, if anything is left over, take a dream trip.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Fresh Start Sale
programme.desc: Lara Spencer and her team of appraisers meet a divorcee who's ready to clear out the clutter, start a new life and take a trip to Singapore. Selling off a house full of memories isn't easy, however, especially when the auctions all start at a dollar.

programme.title: Everything But the House: History Funded Future
programme.desc: Lara Spencer and her team help a couple turn inherited items into a college fund for their son. Everything from speakers, turntables and scientific equipment to fabulous 40s costume jewelry gets auctioned off, and the bidding starts at just a dollar.

programme.title: Home Town: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: An artist wants to raise her teenage son in the small town near their friends and family. With a budget of up to $200,000, her wish list includes plenty of room to welcome visitors and a dedicated art studio.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Home Town: Everybody Wants a Porch
programme.desc: A couple moves from Arizona to Mississippi in search of a slower pace of life and their forever home. They have an all-in budget of $250,000 and a wish list that includes a home with historic Southern architecture and a spacious kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: A Musician's Retreat
programme.desc: A recording producer is back in Laurel looking for an artist's retreat. He received a dilapidated cabin from his late father, and while Ben and Erin are up for the risky restoration challenge, they think he'll get a better return with a bungalow in town.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Coastal Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin have their biggest budget yet to overhaul an old family home while honoring three generations of memories. They give this family a breezy, coastal home full of sentimental touches and nods to their farming history.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Shotel

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The O-Katana

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol'r Plunge

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: I Love Moo!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Line and Lemur
programme.desc: Summer's coming to an end, but Dr. Pol's clients are still rushing in!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-tergeist
programme.desc: Halloween is coming and Dr. Pol is in his element dealing with jumping, flailing and barking clientele.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: All in the Farm-ily
programme.desc: Before a big family dinner, Drs. Schroeder are challenged by rare animal cases.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of American Legends
programme.desc: The fabled history behind enigmatic figures of the Wild West continue to puzzle experts today; now, cutting-edge archaeological investigations could reveal new secrets behind legendary heroes and villains of America's past.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mythical Search for Camelot
programme.desc: Scholars and academics have debated the existence of King Arthur and his heroic Knights of the Round Table for centuries; now, Jamie Theakston embarks on a journey to investigate the fabled folklore and discover the truth behind the legend of Camelot.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mythical Search for Camelot
programme.desc: Scholars and academics have debated the existence of King Arthur and his heroic Knights of the Round Table for centuries; now, Jamie Theakston embarks on a journey to investigate the fabled folklore and discover the truth behind the legend of Camelot.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Nazi Doomsday Project
programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Sonic Weapon
programme.desc: American diplomats stationed in Cuba begin to experience a bizarre mixture of noxious neurological symptoms and seem to be under a mysterious attack; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to determine if a sinister, sonic weapon is at play.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion
programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Yellowstone Supervolcano
programme.desc: Beneath Yellowstone National Park is one of the world's largest active volcanos, and it's poised to erupt at any moment; experts use seismic technology and visual imaging to reveal its catastrophic threat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Sex, Lies and Crimes
programme.desc: A scandalous affair between a tutor and student; Young father's shocking lie; An attorney blindsided by an angry client's fist; Man threatens to kill judge; Bailiff's shoe saves an escapee's life; Judge and defendant have shared past.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: When a man with a shotgun bursts into his home late one night, a young man is forced to defend himself and protect his fiancee. And then, a man goes on a violent rampage in a diner, and two women find themselves in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Snatched
programme.desc: A young woman walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine. Then, with no warning, danger strikes, and both women are kidnapped. But both brave victims outsmart their attackers.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Clues Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother of three is gunned down in a church basement where she's set to teach a fitness class. Police find surveillance video showing a figure in full police body armor stalking the floor in the lead-up to the slaughter.

programme.title: True Conviction: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A 59 year old grandmother is discovered beaten and stabbed to death in her home on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Clues
programme.desc: Two 20-year-olds suffer personal tragedies then have their own lives abruptly snuffed out. He's shot while hanging out with friends; she disappears, only to turn up dead in a staged suicide.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Murdered in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: When Aliza Sherman is stabbed to death in broad daylight, police are convinced the attack was premeditated, and Aliza may have known her killer. Then, the fire that kills Sheila Deviney is ruled an accident until new evidence points to arson and murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: Aspen heiress Nancy Pfister had a taste for adventure, and a knack for making friends from all walks of life. But when her lifeless body was found in the closet of her home, many wondered if freewheeling Nancy had taken one chance too many.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Clues Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother of three is gunned down in a church basement where she's set to teach a fitness class. Police find surveillance video showing a figure in full police body armor stalking the floor in the lead-up to the slaughter.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Murdered in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: When Aliza Sherman is stabbed to death in broad daylight, police are convinced the attack was premeditated, and Aliza may have known her killer. Then, the fire that kills Sheila Deviney is ruled an accident until new evidence points to arson and murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Match to Murder
programme.desc: A beloved mother and daughter are senselessly murdered in their rural Florida cottage and their case goes unsolved for years. Then, out of the blue, a mysterious phone call from nearly 1500 miles away leads investigators straight to the killer.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Whitney Bennett goes missing, her disappearance is a mystery. No-one understands why this popular young woman would leave her home or children. After a 4 month search, police find her body, and a chilling story of murder is revealed.

programme.title: Redrum: A New Man
programme.desc: When a fire breaks out at the home of Ari and Denise Squire, firefighters respond to the scene and find the lifeless body of Ari. Across town, another man, Justin Newman, is reported missing, and his last known location flips this case on its head.

programme.title: Redrum: Blue Blood
programme.desc: Victoria Cushman is a hardworking woman in the New England area. There doesn't seem to be a person alive who would say a bad word about her. So, her community is shocked when her dead body is discovered in her apartment. Who would hurt such a sweet woman?

programme.title: Redrum: The Yoga Shop Murder
programme.desc: When a manager finds her employee Jayna Murray dead and Brittany Norwood cut, beaten and sexually assaulted in a high-end exercise store, detectives set out on a quest to find their aggressors. In a twist, a bloody shoeprint breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: Redrum: Crying Uncle
programme.desc: When Charlie Brandt and his wife Teri take shelter at their niece Michelle Jones' home due to a hurricane, all three end up dead. Investigators are stuck as to why this could have happened until a family secret dating back 33 years surfaces.

programme.title: Real Detective: No Remorse
programme.desc: Sacramento FBI Special Agent Jeff Rinek sought out the worst cases because he was the best at solving them. After being kidnapped at gunpoint from his family home, Rinek knows the chances of finding 7-month-old Frankie Proctor alive are slim to none.

programme.title: Real Detective: Redemption
programme.desc: Detective Eddie Herman of Cobb county, Georgia is a homicide detective at the top of his game, solving major high profile crimes. But when a missing persons turns into a double homicide, Eddie's ego gets in way and the killer walks free.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Follow the Leader
programme.desc: When a father of three is mowed down in a devastating hail of gunfire, police are quick to determine that the murder was carried out by more than one suspect. But even Demery is unprepared for just how many killers he'll need to bring to justice.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Party Crashers
programme.desc: A pair of masked gunmen crash a late-night birthday party, and when guest Noah Randle makes a heroic attempt to intervene, he is shot dead. Detective Rod Demery is called in on his day off to untangle a sinister plot fueled by a bitter grudge.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gypsy Blanchard
programme.desc: A mother is found dead and her disabled daughter missing. As police investigate, they discover many secrets, lies, and betrayals.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: A Hamilton detective follows a string of intriguing evidence in the hopes it will unravel the mystery of why an innocent father of four was executed.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving family mysteriously go missing from their home in Hudson, FL, and loved ones fear the worst. Following a frantic search the family are found, but not all are alive. Courtroom testimony from the trial reveals the chilling details of what ensued.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Bridge of Betrayal
programme.desc: A car fire blazing near a beach sends detectives on a search that ends with a young woman found dead and her mother yearning for answers. The killer's attempt to eliminate evidence actually gives investigators the clues they need to catch him.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
programme.desc: When teen Candace Hiltz is shot dead in Prison Valley, the cops pursue her troubled brother James. With no evidence against him, the case goes cold until ten years later when a cop's storage unit is discovered to contain evidence in Candace's murder.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five BBQ Chicken Favorites
programme.desc: Roger Mooking has plucked his way through plenty of barbecue chicken, but only the very best birds make this list of his top five favourites.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Crepes, Curry and Hot Dogs
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Los Angeles to visit a husband-and-wife-owned truck whose authentic, buttery French crepes are winning over Californians. Next, he's off to North Carolina for a taste of Indian street food.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pho, Paella and Meatballs
programme.desc: Brad slurps a complex Vietnamese pho served by a husband-and-wife owned food truck with a cult following in Los Angeles. Next, he heads to Lakewood, California, to board a buzz-worthy food truck that's giving locals an authentic taste of paella.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Miami
programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Capital City Cuisine
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Washington DC for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Stuffed In Spokane
programme.desc: Ali breaks his fast with a farm-to-food truck twist on the classic P.B.& J in Spokane.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Tony travels to Kansas City, the BBQ capitol of the world, with pal Zamir Gotta, in search of the best barbeque.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Iowa State Fair
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares a tour of the Iowa State Fair, one of the largest and best known state fairs in the U.S. A gastronomic trip through the 445-acre fairgrounds reveals fresh, locally grown sweet corn, baked sausage cavatelli and Dutch letter pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: In Buenos Aires, a strong sense of tradition drives the food culture. Barbecued beef, chimichurri and sweet dulce de leche are featured as Andrew uncovers the mashup of mingling cultures that influence the city's cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Twin Cities
programme.desc: Walleye, bundt cake, and the Jucy Lucy are on tap for Andrew in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Game Day Grub

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Walkies On The Wildside / May Contain Nuts
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Adam Up
programme.desc: In an effort to get out of training duties, Adam enlists Leo's help to create a duplicate Adam using Davenport's experimental cloning device.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Memory Wipe
programme.desc: After coming home with a poor report card, Leo uses Davenport's award-winning memory erasing device to wipe Davenport's short term memory but inadvertently erases 25 years, rendering him a teenager.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Trent Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Leo and Chase use Davenport's technology to get back at Trent on the day of a big test. Meanwhile, Bree gets exposed to a hair growth cream and has disastrous results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Not So Smart Phone
programme.desc: Chase and Adam record themselves doing bionic stunts but then have to scramble to find the phone they used before their secret is exposed. Meanwhile, Leo and Bree scheme to help Perry spend her fortune.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Scramble the Orbs
programme.desc: Leo invents his first high end technology and when he tests the orbs on himself and they appear to work fine. However, problems arise when the orbs can't differentiate between friend and foe and start attacking anyone who comes into contact with Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Taken
programme.desc: Fearful of Krane's plan to destroy the Lab Rats, Douglas makes an attempt to warn the Lab Rats and Davenport about Krane’s evil agenda, but is rebuffed by Davenport.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Which Father Knows Best?
programme.desc: Davenport’s attempts at rebuilding Bree’s bionic chip fail, forcing Leo to go behind his back and ask his brother Douglas for help. However, when the chip becomes life threatening the two brothers are forced to work together.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Alien Gladiators
programme.desc: Leo and Davenport attend fan convention and face off in an epic fire staff battle. Meanwhile, Adam, Bree, and Chase attend the convention dressed like their favorite 'Alien Gladiators' characters in search of the movie's star.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Principle From Another Planet
programme.desc: Leo is determined to capture the bizarre events he believes take place during a lunar eclipse with his video camera.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Leo promises Douglas he'll keep his new bionic arm a secret but when he can't resist showing off in front of Janelle, his arm quickly goes out of control and ends up trapping her in a fire.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic House Party
programme.desc: Davenport is in critical condition at the hospital after a battle with Krane and Leo performs a dangerous bionic ability to help save him.

programme.title: Lab Rats: First Day of Bionic Academy
programme.desc: To his dismay, Leo finds out that he will be a student at the Bionic Academy, not a mentor like Adam, Bree and Chase. Chase engages in a battle against a former nemesis and Adam mentors a younger student.

programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Last Days of Glenn Frey: Heartache Tonight
programme.desc: Glenn Frey was a multi-talented musician and along with Don Henley, co-founded the legendary band, the Eagles. When he died in 2016, his fans were shocked because he was still playing the music they loved.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Shangri-La
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks high into the Sky Caves of Nepal in search of the origins of the Shangri-La myth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Soaked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody are soaked and left in a rainforest; it will take their keen navigational skills to get them out.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Armed with what's left of an avalanche victim's gear, Dave and Cody show how to survive in the harsh Rocky Mountains. Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Frozen Plains
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the scenario of two ranchers, stranded on the windy plains in the dead of winter. Their only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Stuck in the Muck
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head into the Everglades to take on the role of airboaters stuck in a sawgrass prairie marsh under the blazing Florida sun. They must seek shelter in a nearby swamp where water moccasin, python and alligators lay in wait.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eating Dust
programme.desc: From the barren salt flats to the vast desert woodland, Dave and Cody battle the elements in the sun scorched desert of Baja, Mexico. With few supplies, they each demonstrate how to make use of an unlikely resource- urine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Slash and Burn
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how lost hunters can survive in the harsh conditions of Tierra Del Fuego, just 500 miles from Antarctica. To demonstrate how to survive an extreme injury, Dave self-inflicts a laceration and uses black powder to cauterize the wound.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repos a chopper from the roof of a corporate high-rise. Kevin Lacey infiltrates a Mexican ranch to snatch a family plane stolen by a wayward brother. Ken and Danny find themselves up against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Rat Race
programme.desc: Ken and Danny must race to beat out rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers. Mike finds himself in a high stakes game of 'chicken' between a six million dollar Lear jet and a Lamborghini.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja and Justin: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Maja needs weight-loss surgery so she can lose weight, but Dr. Now won't approve her for surgery if she can't overcome getting dumped by her boyfriend Christian without using food to cope. Justin charts a course to be one of Dr. Now's best patients ever.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne and Annjeanette: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There is much to be gained -- and lost -- for Brianne in year two of her journey, in which she both loses weight and gains independence. Getting back with Erica becomes the top priority for Annjeanette, who chooses love over even her own health.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Mission: Skinfixable
programme.desc: Lucy's painful skin condition is preventing her from being the mom she wants to be, Daniel hopes to slay the beast occupying his head, Gini elects to have a large lipoma removed, and Zviko is ready to say goodbye to her ear keloids.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Walking on Broken Glass
programme.desc: Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full when they are faced with twins that have identical toe problems. Also, a boy with extremely itchy feet and a woman born with a massively large toe are desperate for Dr. Ebonie's help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne and Annjeanette: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There is much to be gained -- and lost -- for Brianne in year two of her journey, in which she both loses weight and gains independence. Getting back with Erica becomes the top priority for Annjeanette, who chooses love over even her own health.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Walking on Broken Glass
programme.desc: Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full when they are faced with twins that have identical toe problems. Also, a boy with extremely itchy feet and a woman born with a massively large toe are desperate for Dr. Ebonie's help.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ball

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel

programme.title: Mom: Benito Poppins and a Warm Pumpkin

programme.title: Mom: Turkey Meatballs and a Getaway Car
programme.desc: Christy discovers she enjoys sex most when there's a risk of getting caught. Meanwhile, Bonnie takes her new role as secretary of the women's meeting a little too seriously.

programme.title: Mom: Dirty Money and a Woman Named Mike

programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye
programme.desc: Todd discovers that Faye has injured her foot on yet another gambling adventure and insists she recover at his house. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie push a reluctant Grayson to take up a hobby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Todd takes the juice bar employees on a teambuilding excursion, Savannah and Chase get into a disagreement. And when Faye has a health scare, the Chrisley's are forced to come together.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Goat Farm Yourself
programme.desc: Todd sends Chase and Savannah to a goat farm to learn the value of hard work. But things go array when the siblings let their petty bickering get in the way.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Is It Real?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: The Horse Farmhouse

programme.title: Bargain Block: discovery+ 1st Look: Desert Modern and Mid-Century Museum
programme.desc: Watch this special sneak peek as Keith and Evan work within a very tight budget to tackle their first home renovations on a new block. Old, chipped paint inspires them to design a desert-modern home and turn a '70s camper into a colorful art gallery.

programme.title: House Hunters: Millennials in Dallas

programme.title: Property Brothers: Building a Solid Foundation

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: In the House Revival

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Little Trouble in Big Craftsman

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Tudor Kitchen Complications

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sweat Equity
programme.desc: Nicole helps a newly engaged couple modernize and restore functionality to their outdated, 1970s-inspired kitchen and bathroom. To stay under budget, Nicole teaches them the meaning of sweat equity as they chip in to help the team cross the finish line.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: New Nest, Who This?

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Battle for the Bathrooms

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Grandma's Bachelor Pad

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Here's Looking at Moo

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Money Barks
programme.desc: The animals of Isabella County are getting antsy after such a long winter and they’re up to more trouble than usual.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Nerves of Steer
programme.desc: Horses are driving Dr. Pol wild as he works to fix chunky runny noses, gruesome gashes and even penile problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-tergeist
programme.desc: Halloween is coming and Dr. Pol is in his element dealing with jumping, flailing and barking clientele.

programme.title: Alaska Animal Rescue: All Bark and No Pup
programme.desc: The Alaska SeaLife Center waits for their sea lion to give birth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of the Sun
programme.desc: A brand-new NASA mission to the Sun reveals cutting-edge discoveries about Earth's star. As the Parker Solar Probe dives through the Sun's atmosphere, what it finds challenges everything we know about this strange place.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space's Great Wall
programme.desc: Astronomers make an extraordinary discovery when they uncover a cosmic mega-structure that's one billion light years long, and now investigators race to decode the hidden forces that shape the most massive and mysterious structure known in the Universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of the Sun
programme.desc: A brand-new NASA mission to the Sun reveals cutting-edge discoveries about Earth's star. As the Parker Solar Probe dives through the Sun's atmosphere, what it finds challenges everything we know about this strange place.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space's Great Wall
programme.desc: Astronomers make an extraordinary discovery when they uncover a cosmic mega-structure that's one billion light years long, and now investigators race to decode the hidden forces that shape the most massive and mysterious structure known in the Universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
